## HOOK
# Arkansas Is Not Empty of Civic History ## Book Narrative Arkansas is not a state without civic traditions.

## REALITY
Its history is full of organizing, public struggle, and democratic conflict. From populist movements and labor organizing to civil rights battles and ballot initiative campaigns, Arkansans have repeatedly shaped their future through collective action.
